name: tqx-diagram-excalidraw
description: Create Excalidraw (.excalidraw) diagrams that argue visually, styled in the TwinQX Terracotta Atlas brand (warm Hỏa-Thổ palette — terracotta, ochre, sienna, chocolate, cream; no green, no cool blue). Includes a Playwright render pipeline for visual validation. Adapted from coleam00/excalidraw-diagram-skill (MIT).
